name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures ability to work with numerical data, interpret tables, graphs and statistical information. Suitable for roles requiring numerical analysis, data interpretation and financial reasoning.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to understand and evaluate written information and to draw conclusions from it. Suitable for roles requiring verbal communication, comprehension and written reasoning.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to identify patterns and logical rules in a sequence of shapes/symbols and use them to find solutions to problems. Suitable for roles requiring problem solving and abstract thinking.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to apply logical rules and make correct deductions from information. Suitable for roles requiring systematic and logical thinking.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of mechanical principles and physical concepts. Suitable for engineering, technical and manufacturing roles.

name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire measuring 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace performance. Covers thinking, feeling and relationships dimensions. Used for selection, development and leadership assessment.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses what motivates and engages an individual in their work. Measures 18 dimensions of motivation including achievement, recognition, affiliation and work conditions.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Java 8 programming language including OOP concepts, collections, streams, lambda expressions, and concurrency. For software developers and engineers.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests knowledge of JavaScript including ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming, closures and modern JS patterns. For frontend and full-stack developers.

name: Python (New)
description: Assesses Python programming skills including data structures, OOP, libraries, file handling and scripting. Suitable for data scientists, engineers and backend developers.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests SQL knowledge including queries, joins, subqueries, aggregation, indexing and database design. For data analysts, database administrators and backend developers.

name: C# (New)
description: Assesses C# and .NET knowledge including OOP, LINQ, async/await, generics and design patterns. For .NET developers and software engineers.

name: C++ (New)
description: Tests C++ knowledge including memory management, templates, STL, OOP and systems programming. Suitable for systems, embedded and game developers.

name: Automata Pro
description: Hands-on coding simulation that requires candidates to write actual working code in a realistic development environment. Tests real coding ability beyond multiple choice.

name: Numerical Reasoning - Graduate
description: Graduate-level numerical reasoning test assessing ability to interpret and work with data, percentages, ratios and statistical information.

name: Verbal Reasoning - Graduate
description: Graduate-level verbal reasoning assessing comprehension and evaluation of written passages.

name: Sales Assessment (CCSQ)
description: Measures competencies critical for sales and customer-facing roles including persuasion, resilience, commercial awareness and relationship building.

name: Call Centre Solution (CCSS)
description: Designed for call centre and customer service roles measuring empathy, listening, resilience and service orientation.

name: General Ability – Short (GAS5)
description: Short adaptive general cognitive ability test combining verbal, numerical and inductive reasoning. Suitable when time is limited and a broad cognitive measure is needed.

name: Workplace English (Reading)
description: Measures English reading comprehension in workplace contexts. Useful for roles requiring document reading, email communication and written information processing.

name: Workplace English (Listening)
description: Assesses English listening comprehension in workplace contexts. Suitable for customer-facing, administrative and international roles.

name: Dependability & Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Measures safety awareness, conscientiousness, integrity and reliability. Designed for operational, manufacturing and safety-critical roles.

name: Situational Judgement (SJT) - Manager
description: Presents realistic management scenarios and asks candidates to choose the best response. Measures judgement, decision-making and management competencies.

name: Situational Judgement (SJT) - Customer Service
description: Scenario-based test measuring judgement and behaviour in customer service situations. Assesses empathy, service orientation and conflict resolution.

name: Leadership Report (360)
description: 360-degree feedback tool for assessing leadership effectiveness based on OPQ32 competency framework. Collects views from line manager, peers and direct reports.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF)
description: Competency framework aligned to OPQ32 measuring 8 competency areas and 20 specific competencies. Used for job analysis, assessment centre design and development planning.

name: Administrative Professional – Short Form
description: Measures numerical, verbal and clerical abilities relevant to administrative roles. Assesses attention to detail, data entry accuracy and filing skills.

name: Shortcuts (Windows)
description: Tests knowledge of Windows keyboard shortcuts and productivity tools. Suitable for clerical, administrative and office roles requiring computer proficiency.

name: Microsoft Excel (Advanced)
description: Tests advanced Excel skills including pivot tables, complex formulas, macros and data analysis features. For finance, analytics and business intelligence roles.

name: Microsoft Excel (Basic)
description: Assesses basic Excel skills including formatting, simple formulas and data entry. Suitable for administrative and entry-level professional roles.

name: Graduate Reasoning Test (GRT2)
description: Comprehensive graduate reasoning battery covering verbal, numerical and diagrammatic reasoning. Used for high-volume graduate recruitment and management selection.

name: Technology Professional Assessment
description: Measures cognitive abilities most relevant to technology roles including logical reasoning, numerical analysis and abstract problem solving.

name: Financial Professional Assessment
description: Assesses numerical, verbal and analytical abilities relevant to financial roles including banking, insurance, investment and accounting.

name: Customer Contact - Motivation & Attitude (CCMA)
description: Assesses motivation, attitude and service orientation for customer-facing roles. Measures tolerance for repetitive work, patience and positive service attitude.

name: Scenarios 360 (Multi-rater)
description: Scenario-based 360-degree assessment measuring leadership behaviours using realistic work situations. Suitable for leadership development and succession planning.

name: Smart (Adaptive General Ability)
description: Fully adaptive general intelligence test covering verbal, numerical and figural reasoning. Shorter than traditional batteries with equivalent precision. Good for high-volume screening.

name: Agency Worker Solution
description: Designed for high-volume temporary and agency worker recruitment. Measures reliability, conscientiousness and basic work attitudes.

name: Remote Work Edition (OPQ32r)
description: OPQ32r personality questionnaire with a remote work lens, generating reports highlighting characteristics relevant to working independently, self-managing and virtual collaboration.

name: Coding Simulation – Python
description: Hands-on Python coding simulation where candidates solve real programming challenges in a browser-based IDE. Tests practical coding ability including data manipulation, algorithms and debugging.

name: Coding Simulation – Java
description: Hands-on Java coding simulation testing practical Java development skills including OOP, data structures and problem solving in a realistic IDE environment.

name: Situational Judgement – Graduate
description: Graduate-level situational judgement test presenting work scenarios to measure decision-making, professional judgement and graduate-level competencies.

name: Talent Assessment (TAL)
description: Multi-dimensional talent assessment combining cognitive ability and personality measures. Suitable for identifying high-potential employees and succession planning.

name: Data Entry (Speed & Accuracy)
description: Measures data entry speed and accuracy. Suitable for administrative, back office and data processing roles.

name: Checking (Speed & Accuracy)
description: Tests ability to quickly and accurately check and compare information. Suitable for clerical, administrative, proofreading and quality control roles.

name: Numerical Computation
description: Tests basic numerical computation skills including arithmetic, fractions, percentages and basic algebra. Suitable for operational and entry-level roles.

name: Work Skills Series – Numerical
description: Basic numerical skills for operational and semi-skilled roles. Tests practical number use relevant to manufacturing, logistics and retail environments.

name: Work Skills Series – Verbal
description: Basic verbal skills for operational roles. Tests reading instructions, understanding notices and following written communications in a workplace context.

name: Hogan Personality Inventory (HPI) – via SHL
description: Normal-range personality assessment measuring bright-side personality characteristics predictive of career success, leadership effectiveness and job performance.

name: Sales Potential Questionnaire (SPQ)
description: Specifically designed for sales role selection, measuring drive, persuasion, resilience and customer orientation. Predicts sales performance and revenue generation.

name: IT Support (Technical Knowledge)
description: Tests technical knowledge relevant to IT support roles including networking, operating systems, hardware troubleshooting and help desk procedures.

name: Project Management Professional Assessment
description: Assesses project management knowledge including planning, scheduling, risk management, stakeholder management and agile/waterfall methodologies.
